hero.title: Discover Bhutan with Thubten Travels
hero.subtitle: Tailor-made journeys through the last Himalayan kingdom — crafted with care, guided with heart.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Bhutanese guides
whyChooseUs.text: Born-and-raised guides who know every monastery, valley, and hidden trail by name.

whyChooseUs.title: Tailor-made itineraries
whyChooseUs.text: Every journey is shaped around your interests, pace, and travel style — no two trips alike.

whyChooseUs.title: Hand-picked stays
whyChooseUs.text: From heritage farmhouses to luxury lodges, we choose places that feel like Bhutan.

whyChooseUs.title: End-to-end care
whyChooseUs.text: Visa, SDF, permits, transport, festivals — we handle every detail so you can simply travel.

testimonials.name: Sarah & James
testimonials.text: Our ten days with Thubten Travels were quietly extraordinary — Tiger's Nest at sunrise, a farmhouse dinner in Punakha, hot-stone baths after a long trek. Every detail considered.

testimonials.name: Aiko Tanaka
testimonials.text: I came to Bhutan looking for stillness and found it everywhere — from morning prayers at Kyichu to the long drive into Bumthang. Thank you for a trip I'll never forget.

testimonials.name: The Patel Family
testimonials.text: Traveling with three kids could have been complicated. Instead, it was joyful from the first day. Our guide felt like family by the end.
